title: Ability to lock a dashboard's filters
excerpt: I want to be able to create a dashboard, setup the filters just so, and lock them so that no one else can tinker with them / screw them up.

posts.author: williamn (william noto)
posts.cookedHtml: I want to be able to create a dashboard, setup the filters just so, and lock them so that no one else can tinker with them / screw them up.

posts.author: GFV450 (Gian Franco Vitola)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree that this feature would be mighty useful to manage how much data do we expose to external clients of our organization.

posts.author: BenATawardco (Benjamin Brown)
posts.cookedHtml: This would be an awesome feature for my specific use case. I am currently trying to display errors that we track as associated to KPI’s. I am trying to make dashboards to give insights for each contributor into their KPI’s. The issue is that they would then just be able to change the filter and see everyone else’s KPI’s. If I was able to lock the dashboard filters it would solve this issue.
